# zones.lua

{% hint style="warning" %}
Each zone must have 4 vec4 !!!
{% endhint %}

```lua
Shared.Zones = {
   {
	vec4(841.50115966797, 256.24887084961, 84.98161315918, 108.38188934326),
	vec4(828.072265625, 254.63035583496, 85.309906005859, 100.06729125977),
	vec4(826.50939941406, 240.4189453125, 83.601837158203, 187.89727783203),
	vec4(810.56018066406, 243.00166320801, 84.447677612305, 49.405498504639),
   },
   ...MORE ZONES
}
```
